channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Lunarium launches in May
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Atmospheric fantasy action RPG. gets a release window.

Atmospheric fantasy action RPG Lunarium will launch for PC via Steam in May, developer Lunarium Game Studio announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Lunarium is an atmospheric fantasy action RPG. Play as Ave, a light-armored knight, who teams up with Lune, a mysterious Starfarer. Together, they journey to save a dying world, engaging in challenging battles to retrieve the lost glow of the stars and forsaken memories, unveiling cosmic secrets.

At the bottom, the Sea of Chaos, the birthplace of bubble worlds, where countless bubbles rise, gradually giving life;

At the top, above the Veil of Stars, is the realm where “God” and Childrens dwell, with the glow of stars illuminating the bubbles;

Between these, bubbles float upwards quietly and slowly.

Yet, bubbles rising from the sea can never cross the veil to become eternal. They are destined to burst eventually, their protective water film becoming lighter and then—pop. They shatter, destroyed, with all debris falling back into the sea, merging into the chaos, awaiting rebirth in a new cycle.

Play as Ave, a light-armored knight. Meet a girl with light flaxen hair and embark on a journey beyond reality to save a world on the brink of bursting.

“Our journey begins with parting, and perhaps it will also face parting in the end. The hardships along the way will surpass your understanding and imagination… You might even feel pain because of this.”

“Even so, will you still come with me?”

Key Features

  • Play as Ave, journey together with Lune. Fight side-by-side, collaborate seamlessly for smooth, coordinated attacks.
  • Combat inspired by classic games, featuring strategic maneuvers. Parrying and countering at critical moments to turn the tide of battle.
  • On different battle situations, promptly seek assistance from Lune, cleverly employ distinct skills to prevail.
  • Collect threads of hope throughout your journey to boost their strength. Learn new skills and magic, discover new combat strategies.
  • At the end of each leg of the journey, you will face intimidating enemies. Defeat them to advance.
  • Explore intricately structured levels, enhanced by an attractive art style that creates an atmospheric experience.
  • Hand-crafted animations, vividly showcasing the personalities and charm of the characters.
  • Wander through distinct realms: old shrine that no longer visited, ruins of a shattered kingdom, and churches shrouded in dark mist.
  • Record observations and experiences in the notebook carried on your journey… The world and the universe are wondrous, and as you gather remnants in the sea of stars, you may uncover even more secrets.
  • Enemies of various forms but equal danger lurk within the remnants of the world, a reminder to always be cautious during your adventure.
  • Memory, self, and meaning. Under layers of intertwining narratives, the world and its characters together tell a tale of both sorrow and resolute.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/lunarium-launches-in-may
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ANIMALKIND launches in Early Access on March 30
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Open-world cooperative town-building adventure game dated.

Open-world cooperative town-building adventure game ANIMALKIND will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on March 30, developer Uncommon Games announced. 

“Our goal with ANIMALKIND has been to create a cozy world where you can play with friends, and launching into Steam Early Access lets players jump into that world now,” said Uncommon Games head of product Brian Guenther in a press release. “With the help of our players we will expand the game with new places to explore, characters to meet, and ways to be creative. We can’t wait to grow the game together with our community.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Uncommon Games:

About

In ANIMALKIND, you’ll step into the paws of adorable animal heroes piloting ancient mechs across a vibrant, post-paw-calyptic wilderness. Whether playing solo or with up to three friends in online cooperative play, players will gather resources, explore dynamic biomes, recruit charming townsfolk, and build a thriving community from the ground up. Blending relaxing town-building with playful multiplayer chaos, ANIMALKIND offers a world where corgis, cats, and raccoons wield industrial-grade opposable thumbs to shape their future, one mech-powered adventure at a time.

Key Features

  • Play as an Adorable Animal – Play as an adorable corgi, tuxedo cat, or North American trash panda (common raccoon), each with unique animations and customizations.
  • Pilot an Ancient Mech – Use the power of industrial-grade opposable thumbs and an upgradeable chassis to traverse the world of ANIMALKIND, gather resources, craft, and flex your design skills.
  • Establish a Thriving Town – Gather a community of friendly animals by building homes, laying out paths, and planting gardens.
  • Explore the Ever-Evolving Wilderness – Travel to dynamic wilderness areas with their own biomes, recruitable characters, and resources.
  • Cozy Cooperative Play With Your Friends – Play solo, or invite up to three friends to be a part of your game.

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/animalkind-launches-in-early-access-on-march-30
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Find Your Words launches in April
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Explore a colorful summer camp as a child learning to communicate without speech.

Find Your Words, a short adventure game in which explore a colorful summer camp as a child learning to communicate without speech, will launch for PC via Steam in April, developer Capybara Games announced. It will be available as a free download with an optional paid supporter edition.

Here is an overview of the game, via Capybara Games:

Find Your Words is a short adventure that invites players to explore a colorful summer camp as a child learning to communicate without speech.

Players will be able to trek through scenic campgrounds brimming with wildlife, and build a community one friendship at a time. As the game’s lush world unveils, they’ll collect symbols for their communication binder, understand that different combinations of symbols have unique meanings, and uncover new interactions and activities. Later, as friendships deepen, players will discover the lovable quirks of their camp friends.

Find Your Words will be available for free, and was created by two parents celebrating their kids’ journeys to find their voices.

Find Your Words was created by two long-time Capybara Games developers and fathers, Jon Maur and Vic Nguyen. Inspired by their shared experience raising non-speaking kids, Find Your Words shines a light on how their children and others like them interact with the world.

Jon Maur headed up programming, writing, and design on Find Your Words. His credits include Grindstone, Below, Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery, and Might & Magic: Clash of Heroes.

Vic championed the art, visuals and design for Find Your Words. His credits include Grindstone, Super Time Force Ultra, Sound Shapes, and Might & Magic: Clash of Heroes.

Together, they have a combined 30 years of experience at Capybara Games. Their hope with Find Your Words is for players to learn more about the ways we connect beyond speech.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Window Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/find-your-words-launches-in-april
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: MOTORSLICE launches this spring
item.content:encoded:
• PC

New gameplay trailer released.

Parkour-meets-slice-of-life action adventure game MOTORSLICE will launch for PC via Steam this spring, publisher Top Hat Studios and developer Regular Studio announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Top Hat Studios:

About

Inspired by the Prince of Persia series, traverse liminal brutalist landscapes and fight massive heavy machines in this slice of life action-adventure game.

Key Features

  • Fluid acrobatic gameplay. Climb, run, and slide your way around.
  • Sharp your senses with addictive and brutal fast-paced combat. You die easily, but you kill easily.
  • Climb massive heavy machines in epic boss fights.
  • Traverse liminal spaces and parkour through brutalist landscapes.
  • Minimalist atmospheric adventure with hardcore challenges.
  • Slice-of-life story about a girl doing a routine job in a megastructure.
  • Gorgeous pixelated modern low-poly graphics.
  • Solve problems with physics oriented objects.

Get in, eliminate all the machines, get out. That was the job. But upon arriving at an abandoned megastructure, a girl named “P” discovers an imposing dreadful machine, and she soon realizes that this is no ordinary job.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Window Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/motorslice-launches-this-spring
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
